source.title: Historic Viking cross restored to public view on Isle of Man

en.summary: A 1,000-year-old Viking cross on the Isle of Man has been restored and placed on public display.
en.why_irrelevant: Because it is a niche artifact story far removed from current political and conflict news.

zh.summary: 马恩岛上一块千年维京十字架经过修复后向公众展示。
zh.why_irrelevant: 因为它是一个小众的文物故事，远离当前政治和冲突新闻。

brief: UN warns Middle East crisis is 'getting out of control' as Houthi attacks threaten global shipping, while Trump imposes new tariffs on over 80 nations citing forced labor. In the U.S., a possible hate crime stabbing on the Upper West Side and LA's homeless population rise dominate domestic news.
news_summary: UN chief warns Middle East crisis escalating; Trump slaps tariffs on 80+ countries over forced labor; two men stabbed in possible hate crime in NYC; LA homeless numbers rise; Pentagon list of Iran war deaths changes; India activist ends hunger strike; wildfires in southern Europe; Qantas tests ultra-long-range flight.
papers_summary: No new research papers are highlighted in today's brief.

zh.brief: 今日重点：胡塞武装威胁曼德海峡引发红海航运危机，美国与沙特签署核协议加剧核扩散风险；中国电影《澎湖海战》因触及历史敏感神经撤档。
zh.news_summary: 胡塞武装威胁封锁曼德海峡，全球12%海运石油面临风险；美国与沙特达成核协议，专家警告可能引发中东核扩散。

todays_image.caption: The Tariff Building once handled official communications and trade regulations, while today ABC's removal of drug trade episodes and Labor's avoidance of gambling reform both involve institutions sidestepping controversial truths.
todays_image.title: Tariff Building (also known as the Old General Post Office building)
